title: Smoky Roasted Canadian Apples Crumble
description: A savory and aromatic dish perfect for a light date night meal featuring smoked salt, apple cider vinegar, and an easy crumble topping.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup applewood smoke liquid (or 3-5 pieces of wood per batch if unavailable)

instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Core and slice apples into wedges.
Mix apple cider vinegar, smoked salt, cinnamon, ginger, and all-purpose flour in a large bowl. Add sliced apples and toss well until evenly coated.
Spread apple mixture on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, making sure to cover the entire surface area evenly.
Roast in preheated oven for 20-25 minutes or until apples are tender but not mushy.
While apples are roasting, prepare crumble topping. Mix all-purpose flour with unsweetened applesauce and almond flour (or oat flour).
Remove apples from oven and sprinkle crumb mixture over the top of each apple. Press down slightly to adhere.
Return to oven for another 10-15 minutes or until golden brown and crisp.
Let cool slightly before serving with a scoop of vanilla ice cream for extra decadence.
